items.slide_description: How a focused design sprint cut cart abandonment by 23% for a Vienna retailer.
Shipping 40+ reusable components let three product teams move in parallel.
Turning a weekend concept into a funded product with 5,000 early sign-ups.
Meeting WCAG 2.2 AA from day one, verified with real assistive-tech testing.
A lean activation flow helped new accounts reach their first useful dashboard in minutes.
Editors shipped campaign pages without developer handoffs, while previews stayed production-accurate.
Filtered result pages now keep context, surface useful facets, and recover gracefully from empty states.
Shared queues, reusable answers, and clear escalation paths reduced daily review time.
Image, script, and layout cleanup brought the product site back under its target Core Web Vitals budget.
